name: Governance
description: RFP Hub governance — disputes, publisher allowlist decisions, schema/policy RFCs, and published policies. First-class audit trail for all meta-decisions.

global.schema:
type GovernanceState {
  # Disputes queue
  disputes: [Dispute!]!

  # Publisher verification decisions audit trail
  publisherDecisions: [PublisherDecision!]!

  # Schema / policy change RFCs
  rfcs: [Rfc!]!

  # Published policies (inclusion, ranking, etc.)
  policies: [Policy!]!
}

type Dispute {
  id: OID!
  disputeKind: DisputeKind!
  subjectRef: PHID!
  filedBy: String!
  filedAt: DateTime!
  summary: String!
  status: DisputeStatus!
  assignedTo: String
  resolvedAt: DateTime
  resolution: String
  appealAt: DateTime
  appealReason: String
}

enum DisputeKind {
  DUPLICATE_CLAIM
  INACCURATE_ENTRY
  PUBLISHER_CONDUCT
  REVIEW_DECISION
  POLICY_VIOLATION
  OTHER
}

enum DisputeStatus {
  OPEN
  INVESTIGATING
  RESOLVED
  DISMISSED
  APPEALED
}

type PublisherDecision {
  id: OID!
  grantSystemRef: PHID!
  decision: PublisherDecisionKind!
  decidedBy: String!
  decidedAt: DateTime!
  reason: String
}

enum PublisherDecisionKind {
  APPROVED
  REVOKED
  SUSPENDED
  REINSTATED
}

type Rfc {
  id: OID!
  title: String!
  summary: String!
  author: String!
  proposedAt: DateTime!
  status: RfcStatus!
  ratifiedAt: DateTime
  implementedAt: DateTime
}

enum RfcStatus {
  PROPOSED
  UNDER_REVIEW
  RATIFIED
  IMPLEMENTED
  REJECTED
  WITHDRAWN
}

type Policy {
  id: OID!
  name: String!
  summary: String!
  content: String!
  effectiveFrom: DateTime!
  supersededAt: DateTime
  supersededBy: OID
}

modules.name: disputes
modules.description: Dispute filing + investigation + resolution + appeal lifecycle

operations.name: FILE_DISPUTE
operations.schema:
input FileDisputeInput {
    id: OID!
    disputeKind: DisputeKind!
    subjectRef: PHID!
    filedBy: String!
    filedAt: DateTime!
    summary: String!
}
operations.reducer:
state.disputes.push({
  id: action.input.id,
  disputeKind: action.input.disputeKind,
  subjectRef: action.input.subjectRef,
  filedBy: action.input.filedBy,
  filedAt: action.input.filedAt,
  summary: action.input.summary,
  status: "OPEN",
  assignedTo: null,
  resolvedAt: null,
  resolution: null,
  appealAt: null,
  appealReason: null,
});

operations.name: ASSIGN_INVESTIGATOR
RESOLVE_DISPUTE
DISMISS_DISPUTE
APPEAL_DISPUTE

modules.name: publisher_decisions
modules.description: Audit trail of verified-publisher approval/revoke/suspend decisions

operations.name: RECORD_PUBLISHER_DECISION
operations.schema:
input RecordPublisherDecisionInput {
    id: OID!
    grantSystemRef: PHID!
    decision: PublisherDecisionKind!
    decidedBy: String!
    decidedAt: DateTime!
    reason: String
}

modules.name: rfcs
modules.description: Schema and policy change RFCs with propose → review → ratify → implement flow

operations.name: PROPOSE_RFC
operations.schema:
input ProposeRfcInput {
    id: OID!
    title: String!
    summary: String!
    author: String!
    proposedAt: DateTime!
}

operations.name: START_RFC_REVIEW
RATIFY_RFC
IMPLEMENT_RFC
REJECT_RFC
WITHDRAW_RFC

modules.name: policies
modules.description: Published policies (inclusion, ranking, featured placement, etc.)

operations.name: PUBLISH_POLICY
operations.schema:
input PublishPolicyInput {
    id: OID!
    name: String!
    summary: String!
    content: String!
    effectiveFrom: DateTime!
}

operations.name: SUPERSEDE_POLICY
